name: Relyon Suture
company: MCo Hospital Aids Pvt. Ltd., Bangalore, India
description: Established in 1983, MCo Hospital Aids Pvt. Ltd. is a pioneering Indian manufacturer of surgical sutures and the first company in India to produce surgical sutures. With over 43 years of experience, the company has built a strong reputation and an extensive sales network. The company offers a comprehensive range of sterile absorbable and non-absorbable surgical sutures, available with or without needles. It also manufactures sterile polypropylene surgical meshes, supporting a wide variety of surgical applications with consistent quality and reliability.

name: Welfare Medical Ltd.
description: Founded in England in 2005, the company brings over 25 years of industry expertise. Today, Welfare Medical supports global partners by delivering advanced technologies that enhance clinical outcomes and surgical efficiency. Welfare designs, manufactures, and supplies innovative, high-quality medical devices for hospitals worldwide, with a strong focus on the operating room environment. Its product portfolio includes surgical staplers, laparoscopic instruments, ligating clips and devices, trocar and cannula systems, electrosurgical disposables, and a range of other surgical accessories.

name: Welfare Polymer Clips
description: Welfare Polymer Clips are made from non-absorbable polymer material that is inert, non-toxic, and highly biocompatible. These clips are well tolerated by the human body and offer long-term durability. The material is non-conductive and radiolucent, ensuring it does not interfere with CT scans, MRI, or X-ray diagnostics, making it a safe and reliable choice for surgical procedures.

name: D B T Enterprises Pvt. Ltd.
description: D B T Enterprises Pvt. Ltd. is a leading Nepalese manufacturer and supplier of high-quality hospital furniture. We offer a comprehensive range of both Nepal-made and imported products, including standard hospital beds, advanced ICU motorized beds, mattresses, and related accessories. Our solutions are designed to meet the needs of hospitals and medical institutions across Nepal, ensuring durability, comfort, and reliability.

name: Sterineeds Surgicals
description: Sterineeds Surgicals has built a strong reputation for delivering high-quality gloves and services to both domestic and international markets. With a production capacity of 2.5 million pairs per month, our gloves comply with ASTM 3577 and EN standards. Our manufacturing facility is ISO 13485:2016 certified, ensuring strict quality management systems. We are capable of supplying to European markets with CE certification and to the United States with FDA 510(k) clearance, ensuring compliance with global regulatory standards.

name: Balaji Meditech Ltd.
description: Established in 2009, Balajimeditech is a leading manufacturer of non-woven surgical disposables with extensive industry expertise. We offer a wide range of products including Relyon Disposable Surgical Gowns, Relyon HIV Viral Kit, Relyon TURP Drapes, Relyon PCNL Drapes, Relyon Camera Cover, Surgical Drapes, Surgical Kits, Protective Apparel, Equipment Covers, Surgical Accessories, and Sterile Wraps, under "Surgeon Shield." With a strong focus on quality and hygiene, we continue to serve healthcare institutions with reliable and safe disposable medical solutions.
